import { type ZType, type AType } from './types';
import { zeta, alpha } from './values';

type Status = 'idle' | 'running' | 'done';

const _ignored = 1;
export const value: ZType | AType = _ignored > 0 ? alpha : zeta;

interface ExportedShape {
  status: Status;
}

function getLabel(status: Status): string {
  switch (status) {
    case 'idle':
      return 'Idle';
    case 'running':
      return 'Running';
  }
}

export { getLabel, ExportedShape };
